package rulecoverage

func NegativeServiceMethodMutatesTransportDtoInPlace() string {
    ruleID := "service_method_mutates_transport_dto_in_place"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Services that rewrite handler DTOs instead of mapping to service-layer inputs."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
